# Teleport documentation

> Teleport is an identity-based access platform that secures servers, Kubernetes clusters, databases, internal applications, and desktops using short-lived certificates, detailed audit logging, and fine-grained role-based access controls tied to your SSO provider (e.g., Okta, GitHub, Google Workspace).


## User Guides

> Learn how to access infrastructure resources protected by Teleport.

- [User Guides](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client.md): Learn how to access infrastructure resources protected by Teleport.
- [Securing Agentic AI with Teleport Zero Trust Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/model-context-protocol.md): Access control and audit between LLMs and data sources or MCP servers.
- [Access Teleport Databases over MCP](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/model-context-protocol/database-access.md): How to configure MCP clients to use Teleport databases as MCP servers.
- [Access Teleport Kubernetes clusters over MCP](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/model-context-protocol/kube-access.md): How to configure MCP clients to use Teleport Kubernetes clusters as MCP servers.
- [Access MCP Servers with Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/model-context-protocol/mcp-access.md): How to configure MCP clients to use MCP servers served by Teleport.
- [Introduction to Teleport Clients](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/teleport-clients.md): The basics of connecting to resources with Teleport
- [Notifications](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/teleport-clients/notifications.md): Provides a detailed breakdown of Teleport's notification system.
- [Requesting Access to Roles and Resources](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/teleport-clients/request-access.md): Explains how to request access to resources that your Teleport user does not have permissions to access.
- [Using Teleport Connect](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/teleport-clients/teleport-connect.md): Using Teleport Connect
- [Using the tsh Command Line Tool](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/teleport-clients/tsh.md): This reference shows you how to use Teleport's tsh tool to authenticate to a cluster, explore your infrastructure, and connect to a resource.
- [Using VNet](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/teleport-clients/vnet.md): Using VNet
- [Using the Web UI](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/teleport-clients/web-ui.md): Using the Teleport Web UI
- [Connect Third-Party Clients with Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/third-party.md): Explains how to use the third-party client tools you are already familiar with to access infrastructure protected by Teleport.
- [Ansible](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/third-party/ansible.md): Using Teleport with Ansible
- [Database GUI Clients](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/third-party/gui-clients.md): How to configure graphical database clients for Teleport database access.
- [JetBrains SFTP](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/third-party/jetbrains-sftp.md): How to use a JetBrains IDE to manipulate files on a remote host with Teleport
- [Using PuTTY and WinSCP with Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/third-party/putty-winscp.md): This reference shows you how to use PuTTY to connect to SSH nodes and WinSCP to transfer files through Teleport
- [Visual Studio Code](https://goteleport.com/docs/connect-your-client/third-party/vscode.md): How to use Visual Studio Code's Remote Development plugin with Teleport

## Teleport Zero Trust Access

> Provides guides for the Teleport Zero Trust Access product.

- [Teleport Zero Trust Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access.md): Provides guides for the Teleport Zero Trust Access product.
- [Using the Teleport API](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/api.md): Guides to writing a client application for the Teleport gRPC API, which makes it possible to programmatically manage dynamic resources.
- [Automatically Register Resources with Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/api/automatically-register-agents.md): Learn how to use the Teleport API to start agents automatically when you add resources to your infrastructure.
- [API Getting Started Guide](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/api/getting-started.md): Get started working with the Teleport API programmatically using Go.
- [Generate Teleport Roles from an External RBAC System](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/api/rbac.md): Use Teleport's API to automatically generate Teleport roles based on third-party RBAC policies
- [Authentication and Session Joining](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/authentication.md): Provides information on configuring the way users authenticate to your Teleport cluster or join an existing session.
- [Browser MFA](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/authentication/browser-mfa.md): Complete MFA checks in the browser when using tsh, tctl, or Teleport Connect
- [Hardware Key Support](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/authentication/hardware-key-support.md): Hardware Key Support
- [Headless Authentication](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/authentication/headless.md): Headless Authentication
- [Impersonating Teleport Users](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/authentication/impersonation.md): How to issue short-lived certs on behalf of Teleport users using impersonation.
- [IP Pinning](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/authentication/ip-pinning.md): How to enable IP pinning for Teleport users
- [Joining Sessions](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/authentication/joining-sessions.md): Describes shared sessions and how to configure roles to support joining sessions in a Teleport cluster.
- [MFA for Administrative Actions](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/authentication/mfa-for-admin-actions.md): Require MFA checks to perform administrative actions.
- [Passwordless](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/authentication/passwordless.md): Learn how to use passwordless authentication with Teleport.
- [Per-session MFA](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/authentication/per-session-mfa.md): Require MFA checks to initiate sessions.
- [Compliance Frameworks](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/compliance-frameworks.md): How to use Teleport's access controls to streamline compliance without sacrificing productivity.
- [FedRAMP Compliance for Infrastructure Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/compliance-frameworks/fedramp.md): How to configure SSH, Kubernetes, database, and web app access to be FedRAMP compliant, including support for FIPS 140.
- [SOC 2 compliance for SSH, Kubernetes, and Databases](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/compliance-frameworks/soc2.md): How to configure SOC 2-compliant access to SSH, Kubernetes, databases, desktops, and web apps
- [Device Trust](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/device-trust.md): Teleport Device Trust Concepts
- [Manage Trusted Devices](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/device-trust/device-management.md): Learn how to manage Trusted Devices
- [Enforce Device Trust](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/device-trust/enforcing-device-trust.md): Learn how to enforce trusted devices with Teleport
- [Getting Started with Device Trust](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/device-trust/guide.md): Get started with Teleport Device Trust
- [Microsoft Intune Integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/device-trust/intune-integration.md): Sync your Microsoft Intune inventory into Teleport
- [Jamf Pro Integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/device-trust/jamf-integration.md): Sync your Jamf Pro inventory into Teleport
- [Exporting Teleport Audit Events](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/export-audit-events.md): Learn how to export Teleport audit events to your log management solution.
- [Export Teleport Audit Events with Datadog](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/export-audit-events/datadog.md): How to configure the Teleport Event Handler plugin and Fluentd to send audit event logs to Datadog
- [Export Teleport Audit Events to the Elastic Stack](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/export-audit-events/elastic-stack.md): How to configure Teleport's Event Handler plugin to send audit event logs to the Elastic Stack
- [Set up the Teleport Event Handler Plugin](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/export-audit-events/event-handler-setup.md): Set up Teleport Event Handler plugin with credentials to access events API.
- [Set up the Teleport Event Handler Plugin with the Teleport Kubernetes Operator](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/export-audit-events/event-handler-setup-operator.md): Set up Teleport Event Handler plugin with credentials to access events API, using the Teleport Kubernetes Operator.
- [Export Teleport Audit Events with Fluentd](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/export-audit-events/fluentd.md): Forwarding audit event logs with Fluentd and Teleport Event Handler
- [Export Teleport Audit Events to Panther](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/export-audit-events/panther.md): How to configure the Teleport Event Handler plugin and Fluentd to send audit event logs to Panther
- [Export Teleport Audit Events to Splunk](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/export-audit-events/splunk.md): How to configure the Teleport Event Handler plugin to send audit event logs to Splunk
- [Cluster Management](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management.md): Guides for performing day-two operations on your Teleport cluster.
- [Backup and Restore](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/backup-restore.md): How to back up and restore your Teleport cluster state.
- [Configuring Break-Glass SSH Access for Disaster Recovery](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/breakglass-access.md): Guide to set up break-glass emergency SSH access for critical systems if Teleport becomes unavailable.
- [Monitoring your Cluster and Diagnosing Issues](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/diagnostics.md): Provides guidance on monitoring your Teleport deployment and diagnosing issues.
- [Datadog Integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/diagnostics/datadog.md): How to export Teleport metrics and logs to Datadog
- [Logger Configuration](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/diagnostics/logging.md): Explains how to configure the logger on a Teleport instance.
- [Key Metrics for Self-Hosted Clusters](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/diagnostics/metrics.md): Describes important metrics to monitor if you are self-hosting Teleport.
- [Health Monitoring](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/diagnostics/monitoring.md): How to monitor the health and readiness of a Teleport process.
- [Profiling](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/diagnostics/profiles.md): Collecting pprof profiles.
- [Distributed Tracing](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/diagnostics/tracing.md): How to enable tracing within Teleport.
- [Troubleshooting](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/diagnostics/troubleshooting.md): Troubleshooting and Collecting Metrics of Teleport Processes
- [External Audit Storage](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/external-audit-storage.md): Store audit logs and session recordings on your own infrastructure with Teleport Enterprise Cloud.
- [Proxy Peering Migration](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/proxy-peering.md): How to upgrade an existing Teleport cluster to Proxy Peering mode.
- [Secure Practices for Teleport Clusters](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/security.md): Highlights recommended practices and ways to harden security for your Teleport cluster.
- [Certificate Authority Rotation](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/security/ca-rotation.md): Describes how to rotate Teleport's certificate authorities.
- [Securing Sessions with Client Timeout Enforcement](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/security/client-timeout.md): How to implement idle client timeouts.
- [Cloud Client IP Restrictions](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/security/cloud-client-ip-restrictions.md): Restrict access to your cloud cluster with a configurable allowlist.
- [Database CA Migrations](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/security/db-ca-migrations.md): How to complete Teleport Database CA migrations.
- [Harden your Cluster Against IdP Compromises](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/security/idp-compromise.md): Implement cluster-wide hardening measures.
- [Run Teleport with the PROXY Protocol](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/security/proxy-protocol.md): How to securely configure PROXY protocol usage with Teleport.
- [Reducing the Blast Radius of Attacks](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/security/reduce-blast-radius.md): How to configure Teleport to minimize the scope of security breaches
- [Restrict Access for Privileged Accounts](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/security/restrict-privileges.md): Explains the risks of root-level access to Teleport-protected resources.
- [Revoking Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/security/revoking-access.md): Learn how to revoke access before Teleport certificates expire
- [SELinux Module for Teleport SSH Service](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/security/selinux.md): How to configure SELinux to enforce Teleport SSH Service.
- [TLS Routing Migration](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/tls-routing.md): How to upgrade an existing Teleport cluster to single-port TLS routing mode.
- [Configure Trusted Clusters](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/trustedclusters.md): Explains how you can configure a trust relationship and manage access between two Teleport clusters.
- [Workload Clusters](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/management/workload-clusters.md): How to create and manage Teleport Cloud workload clusters using tctl and Machine & Workload Identity
- [Get Started with Role-Based Access Control](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/rbac-get-started.md): Provides an introduction to the Teleport role-based access control system.
- [Add Labels to Resources](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/rbac-get-started/labels.md): How to assign static and command-based dynamic labels to Teleport resources.
- [Getting Started With Teleport Access Controls](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/rbac-get-started/role-demo.md): Teleport Role-Based Access Control.
- [Teleport Role Templates](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/rbac-get-started/role-templates.md): This guide explains templating in Teleport roles. Templates allow you to enable access to resources depending on the traits of a local or single sign-on user.
- [Local Users](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/rbac-get-started/users.md): Learn how to manage local users in Teleport. Local users are stored on the Auth Service instead of a third-party identity provider.
- [Configure Single Sign-On](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso.md): How to set up single sign-on (SSO) using Teleport
- [Integrate your Identity Provider with Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/integrate-idp.md): Configure user authentication to Teleport through your identity provider.
- [SSO with Active Directory Federation Services](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/integrate-idp/adfs.md): How to configure Teleport access with Active Directory Federation Services
- [Teleport Authentication with Microsoft Entra ID (SAML)](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/integrate-idp/entra-id.md): How to configure Teleport access with Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure AD) as a SAML identity provider.
- [Teleport Authentication with Microsoft Entra ID (OIDC)](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/integrate-idp/entra-id-oidc.md): How to configure Teleport access with Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure AD) as an OIDC identity provider.
- [Set up Single Sign-On with GitHub](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/integrate-idp/github-sso.md): Setting up GitHub SSO
- [Authentication With GitLab as an SSO provider](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/integrate-idp/gitlab.md): How to configure Teleport access using GitLab for SSO
- [Teleport Authentication with Google Workspace (G Suite)](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/integrate-idp/google-workspace.md): How to configure Teleport access with Google Workspace (formerly known as G Suite)
- [Teleport Authentication with Keycloak](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/integrate-idp/keycloak.md): How to configure Teleport access with Keycloak
- [OAuth2 and OIDC Authentication](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/integrate-idp/oidc.md): How to configure Teleport access with OAuth2 or OpenID connect (OIDC)
- [Authentication With Okta as an SSO Provider](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/integrate-idp/okta.md): How to configure Teleport access using Okta for SSO
- [Teleport Authentication with OneLogin as an SSO Provider](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/integrate-idp/one-login.md): How to configure Teleport access using OneLogin as an SSO provider
- [Login Rules](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/login-rules.md): Transform User Traits with Login Rules
- [Set Up Login Rules](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/login-rules/guide.md): Set up Login Rules to transform user traits
- [Working with Multiple Identity Providers](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/multiple-providers.md): Provides guidance on integrating Teleport with multiple identity providers.
- [Rotating SAML Signing Certificates](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/saml-cert-rotation.md): Learn what SAML signing certificates are used for and how to rotate them when they expire
- [Configuring SSO for MFA Checks](https://goteleport.com/docs/zero-trust-access/sso/sso-for-mfa.md): Explains how to set up an authentication connector to delegate multi-factor authentication to your identity provider.

## Teleport Machine & Workload Identity

> Includes guides for Machine & Workload Identity, which replaces static secrets with secure, short-lived identities for machines and workloads.

- [Teleport Machine & Workload Identity](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity.md): Includes guides for Machine & Workload Identity, which replaces static secrets with secure, short-lived identities for machines and workloads.
- [Access Infrastructure using tbot](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/access-guides.md): How to use Machine & Workload Identity to enable secure access to Teleport resources.
- [Machine & Workload Identity with Ansible](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/access-guides/ansible.md): How to use Machine & Workload Identity with Ansible
- [Machine & Workload Identity with Ansible AWX](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/access-guides/ansible-awx.md): How to use Machine & Workload Identity with Ansible AWX
- [Machine & Workload Identity with Application Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/access-guides/applications.md): How to use Machine & Workload Identity to access applications
- [Machine & Workload Identity with Argo CD](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/access-guides/argocd.md): How to use Machine & Workload Identity to enable Argo CD to connect to external Kubernetes clusters
- [Machine & Workload Identity with Database Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/access-guides/databases.md): How to use Machine & Workload Identity to access database servers
- [Machine & Workload Identity with Kubernetes Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/access-guides/kubernetes.md): How to use Machine & Workload Identity to access Kubernetes clusters
- [Machine & Workload Identity with MCP Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/access-guides/mcp.md): How to use Machine & Workload Identity to access MCP servers
- [Machine & Workload Identity with Server Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/access-guides/ssh.md): How to use Machine & Workload Identity to access servers via SSH
- [Machine & Workload Identity with tctl](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/access-guides/tctl.md): How to use Machine & Workload Identity with tctl to manage your Teleport configuration
- [Deploy tbot](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment.md): Explains how to deploy tbot on your platform and join it to your Teleport cluster.
- [Deploying tbot on AWS](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/aws.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on an AWS EC2 instance
- [Deploying tbot on Azure](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/azure.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on an Azure VM
- [Deploying tbot on Azure DevOps](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/azure-devops.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on Azure DevOps.
- [Deploying tbot on Bitbucket Pipelines](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/bitbucket.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on Bitbucket Pipelines
- [Deploying tbot on CircleCI](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/circleci.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on CircleCI
- [Deploying tbot on GCP](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/gcp.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on a GCP VM
- [Deploying tbot on GitHub Actions](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/github-actions.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on GitHub Actions
- [Deploying tbot on GitLab CI](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/gitlab.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on GitLab CI
- [Deploying tbot on Jenkins](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/jenkins.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on Jenkins
- [Deploying tbot on Kubernetes](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/kubernetes.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on Kubernetes with Static JWKS Keys
- [Deploying tbot on Kubernetes with OIDC](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/kubernetes-oidc.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on Kubernetes with OIDC
- [Deploying tbot on Linux](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/linux.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on a Linux host
- [Deploying tbot on Linux (TPM)](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/deployment/linux-tpm.md): How to install and configure the Machine & Workload Identity agent, `tbot`, on a Linux host and use a TPM 2.0 for authentication
- [Machine & Workload Identity FAQ](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/faq.md): Frequently asked questions about Teleport Machine & Workload Identity
- [Machine and Workload Identity Getting Started Guide](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/getting-started.md): Getting started with Teleport Machine and Workload Identity
- [Introduction to Machine & Workload Identity](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/introduction.md): Explains concepts and use cases for Machine & Workload Identity, which replaces static secrets with secure, short-lived identities for machines and workloads.
- [Machine & Workload Identity Manifesto](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/manifesto.md): A manifesto for Machine & Workload Identity
- [Machine & Workload Identity Troubleshooting Guide](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/troubleshooting.md): Troubleshooting common issues with Machine & Workload Identity
- [Machine & Workload Identity Use Cases](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/use-cases.md): Popular use cases for Teleport Machine & Workload Identity
- [AI Agents with Machine & Workload Identity](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/use-cases/ai-agents-mwi.md): Use Machine & Workload Identity to securely grant agentic AI access to infrastructure.
- [Hybrid & Multi-Cloud with Machine & Workload Identity](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/use-cases/hybrid-multi-mwi.md): Use Machine & Workload Identity to streamline the management of identity and access for machines and workloads across cloud providers and on-prem environments.
- [Infrastructure-as-Code with Machine & Workload Identity](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/use-cases/iac-mwi.md): Use Machine & Workload Identity to replace the use of static secrets in Infrastructure-as-Code workflows.
- [CI/CD with Machine & Workload Identity](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/use-cases/mwi-ci-cd.md): Use Machine & Workload Identity to replace static secrets in CI/CD pipelines for accessing servers, databases, Kubernetes clusters and applications.
- [Service to Service mTLS with Machine & Workload Identity](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/use-cases/workload-mwi.md): Use Machine & Workload Identity to issue flexible, short-lived cryptographic identity documents for service to service authentication.
- [Workload Identity](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity.md): Securely issue flexible short-lived identities to your workloads
- [Configuring Workload Identity and AWS OIDC Federation](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/aws-oidc-federation.md): Configuring AWS to accept Workload Identity JWTs as authentication using OIDC Federation
- [Configuring Workload Identity and AWS Roles Anywhere](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/aws-roles-anywhere.md): Configuring AWS to accept Workload Identity certificates as authentication using AWS Roles Anywhere
- [Configuring Workload Identity and Azure Federated Credentials](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/azure-federated-credentials.md): Configuring Azure to accept Workload Identity JWTs as authentication using Azure Federated Credentials
- [Best Practices for Teleport Workload Identity](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/best-practices.md): Answers common questions and describes best practices for using Teleport Workload Identity in production.
- [SPIFFE Federation](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/federation.md): An overview of the Teleport Workload Identity SPIFFE Federation feature.
- [Configuring Workload Identity and GCP Workload Identity Federation with JWTs](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/gcp-workload-identity-federation-jwt.md): Configuring GCP to accept Workload Identity JWTs as authentication using Workload Identity Federation
- [Getting Started with Workload Identity](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/getting-started.md): Getting started with Teleport Workload Identity for SPIFFE
- [Introduction to Workload Identity](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/introduction.md): Describes Teleport Workload Identity, which securely issues flexible, short-lived cryptographic identities to workloads and non-human identities.
- [JWT SVIDs](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/jwt-svids.md): An overview of the JWT SVIDs issued by Teleport Workload Identity
- [Deploying tbot with Workload Identity on AWS](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/mwi-tbot-aws-guide.md): How to deploy tbot and configure Workload Identity on an AWS EC2 instance
- [Introduction to SPIFFE](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/spiffe.md): Learn about Secure Production Identity Framework For Everyone (SPIFFE) and how it is implemented by Teleport Workload Identity
- [Workload Identity and tsh](https://goteleport.com/docs/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/tsh.md): Issuing SPIFFE SVIDs using Workload Identity and tsh

## Teleport Identity Governance

> Provides guides on Teleport Identity Governance.

- [Teleport Identity Governance](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance.md): Provides guides on Teleport Identity Governance.
- [Access Lists](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-lists.md): Use Access Lists in Teleport
- [Getting Started with Access Lists](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-lists/guide.md): Learn how to use Access Lists to manage and audit long lived access to Teleport resources.
- [Nested Access Lists](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-lists/nested-access-lists.md): Learn how to use nested Access Lists to manage complex permissions and grant inheritance in Teleport.
- [Reviewing Access Requests](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-lists/reviewing-access-requests.md): Learn how Access List owners review Access Requests
- [Access Monitoring](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-monitoring.md): Learn how to use Access Monitoring.
- [Just-in-Time Access Requests](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests.md): Use just-in-time Access Requests to request elevated privileges.
- [Configure Access Requests](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/access-request-configuration.md): Describes the options available for configuring just-in-time access to roles and resources in your Teleport cluster.
- [Configure Automatic Reviews](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/automatic-reviews.md): Describes how to configure Access Automation Rules for Automatic Reviews.
- [Routing Access Request Notifications](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/notification-routing-rules.md): How to set up Teleport's Access Monitoring Rules to route Access Request notifications
- [Teleport Community Edition Role Access Requests](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/oss-role-requests.md): Teleport Community Edition allows users to request access to roles from the CLI.
- [Just-in-Time Access Request Plugins](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/plugins.md): Use Teleport's Access Request plugins to least-privilege access without sacrificing productivity.
- [Access Requests with Datadog Incident Management](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/plugins/datadog-hosted.md): How to set up Teleport's Datadog Incident Management plugin for privilege elevation approvals.
- [Run the Discord Access Request Plugin](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/plugins/discord.md): How to set up Teleport's Discord plugin for privilege elevation approvals.
- [Access Requests with Email](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/plugins/email.md): How to set up the Teleport email plugin to notify users when another user requests elevated privileges.
- [How to Build an Access Request Plugin](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/plugins/how-to-build.md): Manage Access Requests using custom workflows with the Teleport API
- [Run the Jira Access Request Plugin](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/plugins/jira.md): How to set up the Teleport Jira plugin to notify users when another user requests elevated privileges.
- [Run the Mattermost Access Request plugin](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/plugins/mattermost.md): How to set up Teleport's Mattermost plugin for privilege elevation approvals.
- [Access Requests with Microsoft Teams](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/plugins/msteams.md): How to set up Teleport's Microsoft Teams plugin for privilege elevation approvals.
- [Access Requests with Opsgenie](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/plugins/opsgenie.md): How to set up Teleport's Opsgenie plugin for privilege elevation approvals.
- [Run the PagerDuty Access Request Plugin](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/plugins/pagerduty.md): How to set up Teleport's PagerDuty plugin for privilege elevation approvals.
- [Access Requests with ServiceNow](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/plugins/servicenow.md): How to set up Teleport's ServiceNow plugin for privilege elevation approvals.
- [Run the Slack Access Request Plugin](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/plugins/slack.md): How to set up Teleport's Slack plugin for privilege elevation approvals.
- [Resource Access Requests](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/resource-requests.md): Teleport allows users to request access to specific resources from the CLI or UI. Requests can be escalated via ChatOps or anywhere else via our flexible Authorization Workflow API.
- [Role Access Requests](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/access-requests/role-requests.md): Use Just-in-time Access Requests to request new roles with elevated privileges.
- [Identity Governance in Action](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/identity-gov-use-cases.md): Common use cases with Teleport Identity Governance
- [Configure Teleport as an Identity Provider](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/idps.md): How to set up Teleport's identity provider functionality
- [SAML IdP Attribute Mapping](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/idps/saml-attribute-mapping.md): How to map user attributes to custom SAML response
- [Using Teleport as a SAML Identity Provider](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/idps/saml-guide.md): How to configure and use Teleport as a SAML identity provider.
- [SAML Application Access Control](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/idps/saml-idp-rbac.md): Learn how to manage access to a SAML service provider (SAML applications).
- [Using the Teleport SAML IdP](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/idps/usage.md): Explains how to enable Teleport users to authenticate to external services using the Teleport SAML IdP.
- [GCP Workforce Identity Federation with Teleport SAML IdP](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/idps/usage/saml-gcp-workforce-identity-federation.md): Manage Google Cloud Platform (GCP) web console access with Teleport SAML IdP.
- [Use Teleport's SAML Provider to Authenticate with Grafana](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/idps/usage/saml-grafana.md): Configure Grafana to use identities provided by Teleport.
- [Access Azure Portal and CLI](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/idps/usage/saml-microsoft-entra-external-id.md): Access Azure Portal and CLI by authenticating with Teleport SAML IdP
- [Identity Governance Integrations](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations.md): Shows you how to sync Teleport RBAC resources with third-party tools and services.
- [AWS IAM Identity Center](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/aws-iam-identity-center.md): Provides an overview of the Teleport AWS IAM Identity Center integration.
- [Advanced Identity Center Options](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/aws-iam-identity-center/advanced-options.md): Describes advanced Identity Center use cases.
- [Getting Started with AWS IAM Identity Center integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/aws-iam-identity-center/guide.md): Explains how to set up and use Teleport AWS IAM Identity Center integration.
- [Rotating the AWS IAM Identity Center SCIM token](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/aws-iam-identity-center/maintenance.md): How to update the AWS IAM Identity Center SCIM token in Teleport
- [Migrating AWS IAM Identity Center from Okta to Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/aws-iam-identity-center/migrating-identity-center-from-okta-to-teleport.md): Explains how to migrate an Identity Center instance from Okta control to Teleport control.
- [Using the AWS CLI tools with Teleport and AWS IAM Identity Center](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/aws-iam-identity-center/using-aws-cli.md): Explains how to use the AWS IAM Identity Center integration to protect AWS CLI tools with Teleport.
- [Entra ID Integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/entra-id.md): Describes how Entra ID integration works in Teleport.
- [Advanced Entra ID Integration Options](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/entra-id/advanced-options.md): Advanced Teleport Entra ID integration configuration options.
- [Configure Teleport Access for Entra ID Users](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/entra-id/configure-access.md): Learn how to map Entra ID groups to Teleport roles with Nested Access Lists.
- [Entra ID Integration FAQ](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/entra-id/faq.md): Frequently asked questions on the Teleport Entra ID integration.
- [Getting Started with the Entra ID Integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/entra-id/getting-started.md): Describes how to set up the Teleport Entra ID integration in Teleport.
- [Setting up the Microsoft Entra ID Integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/entra-id/setup.md): Provides instructions for setting up the Microsoft Entra ID integration using various methods.
- [Configure the Entra ID Integration using Azure Portal](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/entra-id/setup/manual-installation.md): Describes how to manually set up Entra ID for the Teleport Entra ID integration.
- [Configure the Entra ID Integration using Terraform](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/entra-id/setup/terraform.md): Describes how to set up the Teleport Entra ID integration using Terraform
- [Enroll the Teleport Okta Integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/okta.md): Describes how to set up the Teleport Okta integration in order to grant Teleport users access to resources managed in Okta.
- [Okta App and Group Sync](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/okta/app-and-group-sync.md): Explains how to enable the Okta app and group sync integration, which imports Okta configurations into the Teleport RBAC system.
- [Guided Okta SSO Integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/okta/guided-sso.md): Explains how to enroll Okta in your Teleport cluster as an identity provider for single sign-on using the guided flow.
- [Okta Service Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/okta/reference.md): Configuration and CLI reference documentation for Teleport Okta service.
- [Okta SCIM Integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/okta/scim-integration.md): Explains how to use the guided integration enrollment flow to enable the Okta SCIM integration, which allows Teleport to immediately reflect changes in Okta.
- [Okta User Sync](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/okta/user-sync.md): Explains how to set up Okta user sync with the guided integration flow.
- [SCIM Integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/scim.md): How to manage Access List membership using SCIM integration
- [SCIM SailPoint Integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/integrations/scim/sailpoint.md): How to Configure SCIM Connector in SailPoint to manage Access List membership
- [Session and Identity Locking](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-governance/locking.md): How to lock compromised users or agents

## Teleport Identity Security

> An overview of Teleport Identity Security.

- [Teleport Identity Security](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security.md): An overview of Teleport Identity Security.
- [Self-Hosting Teleport Identity Security](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/access-graph.md): Explains how to deploy Access Graph alongside a self-hosted Teleport cluster.
- [Self-Hosting Identity Activity Center](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/access-graph/identity-activity-center.md): Explains how to enable Identity Activity Center.
- [Run Teleport Identity Security on Self-Hosted Clusters](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/access-graph/self-hosted.md): Describes how to deploy Access Graph on self-hosted clusters.
- [Run Teleport Identity Security with Access Graph on Self-Hosted Clusters with Helm](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/access-graph/self-hosted-helm.md): How to deploy Access Graph on self-hosted clusters using Helm.
- [Teleport Identity Security Integrations](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/integrations.md): Integrations in Teleport Identity Security.
- [Discover AWS Access Patterns with Teleport Identity Security](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/integrations/aws-sync.md): Describes how to import and visualize AWS accounts access patterns using Identity Security.
- [Discover Azure Access Patterns with Teleport Identity Security](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/integrations/azure-sync.md): Describes how to import and visualize Azure subscription access patterns using Identity Security.
- [Analyze Entra ID policies with Teleport Identity Security](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/integrations/entra-id.md): Describes how to import and visualize Entra ID policies using Identity Security and Graph Explorer.
- [Analyze and Correlate GitHub Audit Logs and Access Paths](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/integrations/github.md): Describes how to import and correlate GitHub Audit Logs and Access Paths using Identity Security.
- [Discover GitLab Access Patterns with Teleport Identity Security](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/integrations/gitlab.md): Describes how to synchronize GitLab access patterns using Identity Security.
- [Discover NetIQ Access Patterns with Teleport Identity Security](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/integrations/netiq.md): Describes how to synchronize OpenText NetIQ access patterns using Identity Security.
- [Discover Okta Access Patterns with Teleport Identity Security](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/integrations/okta.md): Describes how to synchronize Okta access patterns and audit logs using Teleport Identity Security.
- [Discover Insecure SSH Access with Teleport Identity Security](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/integrations/ssh-keys-scan.md): Describes how to enable SSH Key Scanning using Identity Security to identify access patterns that use long-lived SSH keys.
- [Analyze and Correlate Teleport Audit Logs](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/integrations/teleport.md): Describes how to import and correlate Teleport Audit Logs using Identity Security.
- [Session Recording Summaries](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/session-summaries.md): Describes how to use Teleport Identity security to summarize session recordings with a language model.
- [Session Recording Search](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/session-summaries/session-search.md): Configure and use Teleport Identity Security Session Recording Search to find summarized session recordings.
- [Explore Access Paths and Activity](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/usage.md): Explore identity risks and access pathways with dashboards, graph visualization, and SQL queries.
- [Identity Security Alerts](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/usage/alerts.md): Describes the pre-built security detections that trigger alerts in Teleport Identity Security.
- [See Permission Changes with Access Graph Crown Jewels](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/usage/crown-jewels.md): Describes how to use Access Graph Crown Jewels to see permission changes in Teleport.
- [Uncover Identity Risks with the Standing Privileges Dashboard](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/usage/dashboard.md): Describes the Standing Privileges Dashboard feature of Teleport Identity Security
- [Visualize Access Controls with Graph Explorer](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/usage/graph-explorer.md): Describes the Graph Explorer view of Teleport Access Graph.
- [Investigate Identity-Related Security Risks](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/usage/investigate.md): Describes the Investigate view, which helps you explore identity-related activity from across your infrastructure.
- [Explore Access Paths with the SQL Editor](https://goteleport.com/docs/identity-security/usage/sql-editor.md): Describes the SQL Editor view of Teleport Access Graph.

## Enrolling Teleport Resources

> Provides step-by-step instructions for enrolling servers, databases, and other infrastructure resources with your Teleport cluster.

- [Enrolling Teleport Resources](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources.md): Provides step-by-step instructions for enrolling servers, databases, and other infrastructure resources with your Teleport cluster.
- [Applications](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access.md): Protect applications with Teleport by deploying the Teleport Application Service.
- [Securing Access to Cloud APIs](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/cloud-apis.md): Use Teleport to achieve secure access to your cloud-based APIs.
- [Access AWS with the Teleport Application Service](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/cloud-apis/aws-console.md): How to access AWS with Teleport application access.
- [AWS Console and CLI Access with Roles Anywhere](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/cloud-apis/aws-console-roles-anywhere.md): How to use AWS IAM Roles Anywhere with Teleport for AWS Console and CLI access
- [AWS OIDC Integration](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/cloud-apis/awsoidc-integration.md): How to connect your AWS account with Teleport and provide access to AWS resources.
- [Protect AWS CLI and Console Access with Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/cloud-apis/awsoidc-integration-console.md): Access AWS CLI and Console using AWS OIDC integration.
- [AWS RDS Enrollment Wizard](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/cloud-apis/awsoidc-integration-rds.md): Enroll AWS RDS databases with your Teleport cluster using an enrollment wizard.
- [Protect Azure CLIs and APIs with Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/cloud-apis/azure.md): How to enable secure access to Azure CLIs.
- [Protect Azure CLIs with Teleport Application Access on AKS](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/cloud-apis/azure-aks-workload-id.md): How to enable secure access to Azure CLIs on Azure Kubernetes Service with Workload Identity.
- [Proxy Git Commands with Teleport for GitHub](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/cloud-apis/github-integration.md): How to use Teleport's short-lived SSH certificates with the GitHub Certificate Authority.
- [Protect Google Cloud API Access with Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/cloud-apis/google-cloud.md): How to enable secure access to Google Cloud APIs.
- [Teleport Application Service Configuration](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/configuration.md): Provides instructions for configuring the Teleport Application Service
- [Application Access Role-Based Access Control](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/configuration/controls.md): Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for Teleport application access.
- [Dynamic App Registration](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/configuration/dynamic-registration.md): Register/unregister apps without restarting Teleport.
- [Protect a Web Application with Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/getting-started.md): Provides instructions to set up the Teleport Application Service and enable secure access to a web application.
- [Application Access JWT Authentication](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/jwt.md): Guides for using Teleport application access JWT authentication.
- [Using JWT Authentication with Elasticsearch](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/jwt/elasticsearch.md): How to use JWT Authentication with Elasticsearch
- [Using JWT Authentication with Grafana](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/jwt/grafana.md): How to use JWT Authentication with Grafana
- [Use JWT Tokens With Application Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/jwt/introduction.md): How to use JWT tokens for authentication with Teleport application access.
- [Protecting Applications with Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/protect-apps.md): Provides step-by-step instructions to protecting different kinds of applications with Teleport.
- [Amazon Athena Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/protect-apps/amazon-athena.md): How to access Amazon Athena with Teleport
- [Access REST APIs With Teleport Application Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/protect-apps/api-access.md): How to access REST APIs with Teleport application access.
- [Web Application Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/protect-apps/connecting-apps.md): In this getting started guide, learn how to connect an application to your Teleport cluster by running the Teleport Application Service.
- [Amazon DynamoDB using the Teleport Application Service](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/protect-apps/dynamodb.md): How to access Amazon DynamoDB through the Teleport Application Service
- [Access OpenClaw using the Teleport Application Service](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/protect-apps/openclaw.md): Securely access your OpenClaw Control UI with Teleport.
- [TCP Application Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/protect-apps/tcp.md): How to configure Teleport for accessing plain TCP apps
- [Teleport Application Service Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/reference.md): Configuration and CLI reference documentation for Teleport application access.
- [Troubleshooting Application Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/troubleshooting-apps.md): Describes common issues and solutions for access to applications protected by Teleport.
- [VNet](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/application-access/vnet.md): How to configure custom DNS zones for VNet
- [Auto-Discovery](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery.md): Automatically detect and enroll resources in your infrastructure
- [Database Discovery](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/databases.md): Detailed guides for configuring database discovery.
- [AWS Database Discovery](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/databases/aws.md): How to configure Teleport to auto-discover AWS databases.
- [Kubernetes Cluster Discovery](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/kubernetes.md): Detailed guides for configuring Kubernetes Clusters Discovery.
- [Teleport AKS Auto-Discovery](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/kubernetes/aks-discovery.md): Auto-Discovery of AKS clusters in Azure cloud.
- [Kubernetes Auto-Discovery for Amazon EKS](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/kubernetes/eks-discovery.md): How to configure Teleport to automatically enroll EKS clusters.
- [Manual EKS Auto-Discovery Configuration](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/kubernetes/eks-discovery/eks-discovery-manual.md): How to configure Teleport EKS auto-discovery manually.
- [Terraform EKS Auto-Discovery Configuration](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/kubernetes/eks-discovery/eks-discovery-terraform.md): How to configure Teleport EKS auto-discovery with Terraform
- [Teleport GKE Auto-Discovery](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/kubernetes/gke-discovery.md): How to configure auto-discovery of Google Kubernetes Engine clusters in Teleport.
- [Enroll Kubernetes Services as Teleport Applications](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/kubernetes-applications.md): Teleport can automatically detect applications running in your Kubernetes clusters and register them with Teleport for secure access.
- [Get Started with Kubernetes Application Discovery](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/kubernetes-applications/get-started.md): Detailed guide for configuring Kubernetes Application Discovery.
- [Kubernetes Application Discovery Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/kubernetes-applications/reference.md): This guide is a comprehensive reference of configuration options for automatically enrolling Kubernetes applications with Teleport.
- [Auto-Discovery Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/reference.md): Configuration reference for the Teleport Discovery Service.
- [Discovery Service AWS IAM Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/reference/aws-iam.md): AWS IAM permissions for the Teleport Discovery Service.
- [Labels](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/reference/labels.md): Learn about resource labels applied during auto-discovery
- [Server Auto-Discovery](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/servers.md): You can set up the Teleport Discovery Service to automatically enroll servers in your infrastructure.
- [Server Auto-Discovery for Azure Virtual Machines](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/servers/azure-vm-discovery.md): How to configure Teleport to automatically enroll Azure virtual machines.
- [Manual Azure VM Auto-Discovery Configuration](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/servers/azure-vm-discovery/azure-vm-discovery-manual.md): How to manually configure Teleport to automatically enroll Azure virtual machines.
- [Terraform Azure VM Auto-Discovery Configuration](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/servers/azure-vm-discovery/azure-vm-discovery-terraform.md): How to configure Teleport Azure VM auto-discovery with Terraform
- [Server Auto-Discovery for Amazon EC2](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/servers/ec2-discovery.md): How to configure Teleport to automatically enroll EC2 instances.
- [Guided EC2 Auto-Discovery Configuration](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/servers/ec2-discovery/ec2-discovery-guided.md): How to configure Teleport EC2 auto-discovery using Teleport to configure permissions
- [Manual EC2 Auto-Discovery Configuration](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/servers/ec2-discovery/ec2-discovery-manual.md): How to configure Teleport EC2 auto-discovery with manually configured permissions
- [EC2 Auto-Discovery Configuration for AWS Organizations for self-hosted Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/servers/ec2-discovery/ec2-discovery-organization.md): How to configure Teleport EC2 auto-discovery for discovering instances in the AWS Organization
- [Terraform EC2 Auto-Discovery Configuration](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/servers/ec2-discovery/ec2-discovery-terraform.md): How to configure Teleport EC2 auto-discovery with Terraform
- [Automatically Discover GCP Compute Instances](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/servers/gcp-discovery.md): How to configure Teleport to automatically enroll GCP compute instances.
- [Troubleshooting Server Auto-Discovery](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/auto-discovery/servers/troubleshooting.md): Common diagnostic steps for Teleport server auto-discovery.
- [Automatically Label Teleport Agents](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/automatic-labels.md): Provides information on labeling Teleport Agents automatically by integrating with your cloud provider.
- [EC2 Tags as Teleport Node Labels](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/automatic-labels/ec2-tags.md): How to set up Teleport Node labels based on EC2 tags
- [GCP Tags and Labels as Teleport Agent Labels](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/automatic-labels/gcp-tags.md): How to set up Teleport Agent labels based on GCP tags and labels
- [Oracle Cloud Tags as Teleport Agent Labels](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/automatic-labels/oracle-tags.md): How to set up Teleport Agent labels based on Oracle Cloud tags
- [Databases](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access.md): Provide secure connections to databases by improving access control and visibility
- [Database Automatic User Provisioning](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/auto-user-provisioning.md): Configure automatic user provisioning for databases.
- [Amazon Redshift Automatic User Provisioning](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/auto-user-provisioning/aws-redshift.md): Configure automatic user provisioning for Amazon Redshift.
- [MariaDB Automatic User Provisioning](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/auto-user-provisioning/mariadb.md): Configure automatic user provisioning for MariaDB.
- [MongoDB Automatic User Provisioning](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/auto-user-provisioning/mongodb.md): Configure automatic user provisioning for MongoDB.
- [MySQL Automatic User Provisioning](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/auto-user-provisioning/mysql.md): Configure automatic user provisioning for MySQL.
- [PostgreSQL Automatic User Provisioning](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/auto-user-provisioning/postgres.md): Configure automatic user provisioning for PostgreSQL.
- [Database Enrollment Guides](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/enrollment.md): Provides instructions on enrolling databases with your Teleport cluster for secure access, authentication, authorization, and audit.
- [Enroll AWS Databases](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/enrollment/aws.md): Provides instructions on protecting databases in your AWS-managed infrastructure with Teleport.
- [Database Access with Amazon Keyspaces (Apache Cassandra)](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/enrollment/aws/aws-cassandra-keyspaces.md): How to configure Teleport database access with Amazon Keyspaces (Apache Cassandra)
- [AWS Cross-Account Database Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/enrollment/aws/aws-cross-account.md): How to connect AWS databases in external AWS accounts to Teleport.
- [Database Access with Amazon DocumentDB](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/enrollment/aws/aws-docdb.md): How to access Amazon DocumentDB with Teleport database access
- [Database Access with Amazon DynamoDB](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/enrollment/aws/aws-dynamodb.md): How to access Amazon DynamoDB with Teleport database access
- [Database Access with Amazon MemoryDB](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/enrollment/aws/aws-memorydb.md): How to configure Teleport database access with Amazon MemoryDB
- [Database Access with Amazon OpenSearch](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/enrollment/aws/aws-opensearch.md): How to access Amazon OpenSearch with Teleport database access
- [Database Access with Amazon ElastiCache Serverless for Redis and Valkey](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/enrollment/aws/elasticache-serverless.md): How to configure Teleport database access with Amazon ElastiCache Serverless for Redis and Valkey.
- [Database Access with Amazon Redshift](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/enrollment/aws/postgres-redshift.md): How to configure Teleport database access with Amazon Redshift.
- [Protecting Amazon RDS and Aurora Databases](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/enrollment/aws/rds.md): Guides for protecting Amazon RDS databases with Teleport

- [Database Access with Amazon RDS Oracle with Kerberos Authentication](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/database-access/enrollment/aws/rds/rds-oracle.md): How to enroll Amazon RDS Oracle in your Teleport cluster with Kerberos authentication.

- [Connect a Grafana MCP Server to Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/mcp-access/integration-guides/grafana.md): Set up a Grafana MCP server for access through Teleport

- [MCP Access Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/mcp-access/reference.md): Configuration and CLI reference for Teleport MCP access.
- [Troubleshooting MCP Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/mcp-access/troubleshooting.md): Describes common issues and solutions for access to MCP servers protected by Teleport.

- [Server Access Getting Started Guide](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/getting-started.md): Getting started with Teleport server access.
- [Server Access Configuration Guides](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/guides.md): Teleport server access guides.
- [Configure SSH with the Linux Auditing System](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/guides/auditd.md): How to configure Teleport SSH with auditd (Linux Auditing System).
- [Enhanced Session Recording for SSH with BPF](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/guides/bpf-session-recording.md): How to record your SSH session commands using BPF.
- [Encrypted Session Recordings](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/guides/encrypted-session-recordings.md): How to enable encrypted session recordings using your CA key backend.
- [Rotating Session Recording Encryption Keys](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/guides/encrypted-session-recordings/rotating-keys.md): How to rotate automatically provisioned session recording encryption keys.
- [Rotating Manual Session Recording Encryption Keys](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/guides/encrypted-session-recordings/rotating-manual-keys.md): How to rotate private keys for encrypted session recordings while designating certain keys only for decryption.
- [Configure Teleport to Create Host Users](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/guides/host-user-creation.md): How to configure Teleport to automatically create transient host users.
- [Configure SSH with Pluggable Authentication Modules](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/guides/ssh-pam.md): How to configure Teleport SSH with PAM (Pluggable Authentication Modules).
- [Enrolling OpenSSH Servers with Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/openssh.md): Teleport Agentless OpenSSH integration guides.
- [Using Teleport with OpenSSH in agentless mode](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/openssh/openssh-agentless.md): This guide shows you how to set up Teleport in agentless mode to enable secure access to OpenSSH servers so you can protect systems that do not run a Teleport binary.
- [Using Teleport with OpenSSH in agentless mode (manual installation)](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/openssh/openssh-manual-install.md): This guide shows you how to set up Teleport to enable secure access to OpenSSH servers so you can protect legacy systems that do not run a Teleport binary.
- [Access Controls for Servers](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/rbac.md): Role-based access control (RBAC) for Teleport server access.
- [Troubleshooting Server Access](https://goteleport.com/docs/enroll-resources/server-access/troubleshooting-server.md): Describes common issues and solutions for access to servers.

## Teleport Reference Guides

> Provides comprehensive information on configuration fields, Teleport commands, and other ways of interacting with Teleport.

- [Teleport Reference Guides](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference.md): Provides comprehensive information on configuration fields, Teleport commands, and other ways of interacting with Teleport.
- [Access Controls References](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/access-controls.md): Contains guides to configuring authentication and authorization in Teleport.
- [Access List Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/access-controls/access-lists.md): An explanation and overview of Access Lists in Teleport.
- [Access Monitoring Event Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/access-controls/access-monitoring-events.md): Provides a comprehensive list of Access Monitoring events, their fields, and their types.
- [Access Monitoring Rule Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/access-controls/access-monitoring-rules.md): An explanation and overview of Access Monitoring Rules.
- [Authentication Options](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/access-controls/authentication.md): A reference for Teleport's authentication connectors
- [Login Rules Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/access-controls/login-rules.md): Reference documentation for Login Rules
- [Predicate Language](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/access-controls/predicate-language.md): How to use Teleport's predicate language to define filter conditions.
- [Teleport Role Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/access-controls/roles.md): Explains the configuration settings that you can include in a Teleport role, which enables you to apply access controls for your infrastructure.
- [SAML Identity Provider Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/access-controls/saml-idp.md): Reference documentation for the SAML identity provider
- [User Types](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/access-controls/user-types.md): Describes the different types of Teleport users and their properties.
- [Teleport Architecture](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture.md): Provides detailed information about how Teleport works.
- [Managed Updates](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/agent-update-management.md): This chapter explains how Teleport Agent Managed Updates work.
- [Teleport Agent Architecture](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/agents.md): Describes the architecture that enables Teleport to securely proxy client traffic to infrastructure resources.
- [API Architecture](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/api-architecture.md): Architectural overview of the Teleport gRPC API.
- [Teleport Authentication](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/authentication.md): This chapter explains how Teleport uses certificate authorities to authenticate users and services.
- [Teleport Authorization](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/authorization.md): This chapter explains how Teleport authorizes users and roles.
- [Device Trust Architecture](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/device-trust.md): How Teleport Device Trust works.
- [Kubernetes App Discovery Architecture](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/kubernetes-applications-architecture.md): Learn how Teleport automatically discovers applications running on Kubernetes.
- [Machine & Workload Identity Architecture](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/machine-id-architecture.md): How Teleport Machine & Workload Identity works.
- [Teleport Proxy Service](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/proxy.md): Architecture of Teleport's identity-aware proxy service
- [Teleport Relay Service](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/relay.md): Architecture of Teleport's Relay service
- [Teleport Session Recording](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/session-recording.md): An overview of Teleport's session recording and its configuration
- [Teleport Enterprise Cloud Architecture](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/teleport-cloud-architecture.md): Cloud security, availability, and networking details.
- [TLS Routing](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/tls-routing.md): How Teleport implements a single-port setup with TLS routing
- [Trusted Clusters Architecture](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/architecture/trustedclusters.md): Deep dive into design of Teleport Trusted Clusters.
- [Audit Event Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/audit-events.md): Provides a comprehensive list of Teleport audit events and their fields.
- [Command-Line Tool References](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/cli.md): Detailed guide and reference documentation for Teleport's command line interface (CLI) tools.
- [fdpass-teleport CLI reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/cli/fdpass-teleport.md): Comprehensive reference of subcommands, flags, and arguments for the fdpass-teleport CLI tool.
- [tbot Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/cli/tbot.md): Provides a comprehensive list of commands, arguments, and flags for tbot.
- [tctl Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/cli/tctl.md): Provides a comprehensive list of commands, arguments, and flags for tctl.
- [teleport Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/cli/teleport.md): Provides a comprehensive list of commands, arguments, and flags for teleport.
- [teleport-update CLI reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/cli/teleport-update.md): Comprehensive reference of subcommands, flags, and arguments for the teleport-update CLI tool.
- [tsh Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/cli/tsh.md): Provides a comprehensive list of commands, arguments, and flags for tsh.
- [Teleport Deployment References](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment.md): Provides reference information for running Teleport on your infrastructure.
- [Storage Backends](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/backends.md): How to configure Teleport deployment for high-availability using storage backends
- [Teleport Configuration Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/config.md): The detailed guide and reference documentation for configuring Teleport for SSH and Kubernetes access.
- [Teleport Identity Security Configuration](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/identity-security-config.md): The detailed guide and reference documentation for configuring Teleport Identity Security.
- [Join Methods and Tokens](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/join-methods.md): Describes the different ways to configure a Teleport to join a cluster.
- [Managed Updates Resource Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/managed-updates-v2.md): This page describes the details of the Managed Updates v2 resources.
- [Teleport Monitoring References](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/monitoring.md): Provides comprehensive guides to monitoring data available from Teleport.
- [Audit Events and Records](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/monitoring/audit.md): Reference of Teleport Audit Events and Session Records
- [Event Handler Plugin Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/monitoring/event-handler.md): Configure the Event Handler plugin to export Teleport audit log events to Fluentd.
- [Teleport Metrics](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/monitoring/metrics.md): Comprehensive list of all metrics exposed by Teleport.
- [Distributed Tracing Configuration Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/monitoring/tracing-service-configuration.md): Configuration reference for Distributed Tracing.
- [Teleport Networking Reference](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/networking.md): This reference explains the networking requirements of a Teleport cluster, including its public address, ports, and support for HTTP CONNECT proxies.
- [Scaling](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/scaling.md): How to configure Teleport for large-scale deployments
- [Teleport Signals](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/signals.md): Signals you can send to a running teleport process.
- [Signature Algorithms](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/signature-algorithms.md): Signature algorithms used in Teleport.
- [Reconciling Static and Dynamic Configuration](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/deployment/static-and-dynamic-configuration.md): Learn how Teleport reconciles static configuration files with dynamic resources managed through IaC tools.

- [Reference for the teleport_autoupdate_config Terraform data-source](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/infrastructure-as-code/terraform-provider/data-sources/autoupdate_config.md): This page describes the supported values of the teleport_autoupdate_config data-source of the Teleport Terraform provider.
- [Reference for the teleport_autoupdate_version Terraform data-source](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/infrastructure-as-code/terraform-provider/data-sources/autoupdate_version.md): This page describes the supported values of the teleport_autoupdate_version data-source of the Teleport Terraform provider.

- [Bound Keypair Joining Admin Guide](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/bound-keypair/admin-guide.md): How to deploy and maintain bots in production with Bound Keypair Joining
