- [Diagnostics Service](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/diagnostics-service.md): Reference information for the `tbot` diagnostics service.
- [Telemetry](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/telemetry.md): An explanation of the telemetry collected by Machine & Workload Identity
- [Teleport MWI Terraform Provider](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/terraform-provider-mwi.md): Reference documentation of the Teleport MWI Terraform provider.
- [MWI Terraform data-sources index](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/terraform-provider-mwi/data-sources.md): Index of all the data-sources supported by the Teleport MWI Terraform Provider
- [Reference for the teleportmwi_kubernetes Terraform data-source](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/terraform-provider-mwi/data-sources/kubernetes.md): This page describes the supported values of the teleportmwi_kubernetes data-source of the Teleport MWI Terraform provider.
- [MWI Terraform ephemeral resources index](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/terraform-provider-mwi/ephemeral-resources.md): Index of all the resources supported by the Teleport MWI Terraform Provider
- [Reference for the teleportmwi_kubernetes Terraform ephemeral resource](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/terraform-provider-mwi/ephemeral-resources/kubernetes.md): This page describes the supported values of the teleportmwi_kubernetes ephemeral resource of the Teleport MWI Terraform provider.
- [Workload Identity References](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity.md): Configuration and CLI reference for Teleport Workload Identity
- [Workload Identity Attributes](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/attributes.md): Information about the attributes that can be used in templating and rules in the WorkloadIdentity resource.
- [WorkloadIdentity Configuration Resource migration](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/configuration-resource-migration.md): Migrating to the new WorkloadIdentity resource configuration
- [Workload Identity X.509 Issuer Override Resource](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/issuer-override.md): Provides information about the `workload_identity_x509_issuer_override` resource.
- [Workload Identity Revocations](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/revocations.md): Information about performing revocations for issued workload identity credentials
- [Sigstore Workload Attestation](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/sigstore-attestation.md): Using Teleport's integration with Sigstore to ensure workload supply chain security
- [Workload Identity API & Workload Attestation](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/workload-identity-api-and-workload-attestation.md): Information about the `tbot` Workload Identity API service and Workload Attestation functionality
- [WorkloadIdentity Resource](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/machine-workload-identity/workload-identity/workload-identity-resource.md): Information about the WorkloadIdentity resource
- [Public Certificates & Encryption Keys](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/public-certificates.md): Provides certificates and public keys used to sign Teleport software.
- [Vulnerability Management](https://goteleport.com/docs/reference/vulnerability-management.md): Explains how vulnerabilities in Teleport's products are managed.

## Docs

- [The Teleport Infrastructure Identity Platform](https://goteleport.com/docs/index.md): Read an overview of the Teleport Access Platform. Learn how to implement Zero Trust Security across all your infrastructure for enhanced protection and streamlined access control.
- [Teleport Agentic Identity Framework](https://goteleport.com/docs/agentic-identity-framework.md): Describes a design and reference implementation for the secure deployment of agents on infrastructure.
- [Teleport Agentic Identity Framework](https://goteleport.com/docs/agentic-identity-framework.md): Describes a design and reference implementation for the secure deployment of agents on infrastructure.
- [Secure Agent Environment](https://goteleport.com/docs/agentic-identity-framework/secure-agent-environment.md): Provides architectural principles for isolating agentic workloads in order to manage agentic identity.
- [Beams](https://goteleport.com/docs/beams.md): Trusted Runtimes for Infrastructure Agents
- [Teleport Changelog](https://goteleport.com/docs/changelog.md): The Changelog provides a comprehensive description of the changes introduced by each Teleport release.
- [Teleport Enterprise Cloud FAQ](https://goteleport.com/docs/cloud-faq.md): Teleport cloud frequently asked questions.
- [Configure Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration.md): Configure users, roles, authentication connectors, and more with tctl, Terraform, and Kubernetes resources.
- [Dynamic Resource Management Guides](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/resource-guides.md): Provides instructions on managing specific dynamic resources with tctl and the Teleport Terraform provider and Kubernetes operator.
- [Creating Access Lists with IaC](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/resource-guides/access-list.md): Use Infrastructure-as-Code tooling to create Access Lists.
- [Registering Agentless OpenSSH Servers with IaC](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/resource-guides/agentless-ssh-servers.md): Use infrastructure-as-code tooling to register Agentless OpenSSH servers in Teleport.
- [Configuring Kubernetes OIDC Joining With IaC](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/resource-guides/kubernetes-oidc-join-token.md): Use infrastructure-as-code tooling to join Teleport Kubernetes agents.
- [Deploying Login Rules Using Kubernetes Operator](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/resource-guides/login-rules-operator.md): Use Teleport's Kubernetes Operator to deploy Login Rules to your cluster
- [Deploying Login Rules via Terraform](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/resource-guides/login-rules-terraform.md): Use Teleport's Terraform Provider to deploy Login Rules to your cluster
- [Managing Trusted Clusters With IaC](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/resource-guides/trusted-cluster.md): Use infrastructure-as-code tooling to create Teleport trusted clusters.
- [Managing Users And Roles With IaC](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/resource-guides/user-and-role.md): Use infrastructure-as-code tooling to create Teleport users and roles.
- [Teleport Kubernetes Operator](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/teleport-operator.md): Easily manage Teleport resources from Kubernetes
- [Looking up Values from Secrets](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/teleport-operator/secret-lookup.md): How to store sensitive values in a Kubernetes Secret and have the operator look them up.
- [Kubernetes Operator in teleport-cluster Helm chart](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/teleport-operator/teleport-operator-helm.md): Deploy the operator alongside your Helm-deployed Teleport Cluster.
- [Standalone Kubernetes Operator](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/teleport-operator/teleport-operator-standalone.md): Run a standalone operator against a remote Teleport cluster such as Teleport Cloud.
- [Using the Teleport Terraform Provider](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/terraform-provider.md): How to manage dynamic resources using the Teleport Terraform provider.
- [Run the Teleport Terraform Provider in CI or Cloud](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/terraform-provider/ci-or-cloud.md): How to manage dynamic resources using the Teleport Terraform provider from your CI pipelines or Cloud provider.
- [Run the Teleport Terraform Provider on a Server](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/terraform-provider/dedicated-server.md): How to manage dynamic resources using the Teleport Terraform provider from a dedicated deployment server with Machine & Workload Identity .
- [Run the Teleport Terraform Provider on env zero](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/terraform-provider/env0.md): How to manage dynamic resources using the Teleport Terraform provider on env zero.
- [Importing Teleport Resources into Terraform](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/terraform-provider/import-existing-resources.md): How to import your existing Teleport resources into Terraform
- [Run the Teleport Terraform Provider Locally](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/terraform-provider/local.md): How to manage dynamic resources using the Teleport Terraform provider from your workstation.
- [Run the Teleport Terraform Provider with Long-Lived Credentials](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/terraform-provider/long-lived-credentials.md): How to manage dynamic resources using the Teleport Terraform provider from anywhere with long-lived credentials.
- [Run the Teleport Terraform Provider on Spacelift](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/terraform-provider/spacelift.md): How to manage dynamic resources using the Teleport Terraform provider on the Spacelift platform.
- [Run the Teleport Terraform Provider on Terraform Cloud](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/terraform-provider/terraform-cloud.md): How to manage dynamic resources using the Teleport Terraform provider on HCP Terraform, Terraform Cloud, and Terraform Enterprise.
- [Get Started with the Teleport Terraform Provider](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/terraform-provider/terraform-getting-started.md): Provides an example to help you get started managing dynamic resources in a Teleport cluster using Terraform.
- [Getting Started with tctl](https://goteleport.com/docs/configuration/using-tctl.md): Provides a conceptual overview of tctl, the Teleport administrative client tool.
- [Teleport Core Concepts](https://goteleport.com/docs/core-concepts.md): Learn the key components that make up Teleport.
- [Teleport FAQ](https://goteleport.com/docs/faq.md): Frequently Asked Questions About Using Teleport
- [Teleport Feature Matrix](https://goteleport.com/docs/feature-matrix.md): Provides a comparison of features available in Teleport products.
- [Get Started with Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/get-started.md): Learn how to deploy a cluster, connect infrastructure, set up access controls, and review audit logs.
- [Step 3 - Set Up Access Controls](https://goteleport.com/docs/get-started/access.md): Configure identity-based access controls in your Teleport cluster.
- [Step 4 - Monitor Audit Logs](https://goteleport.com/docs/get-started/audit.md): Explore audit logging features in your Teleport cluster.
- [Step 2 - Connect Infrastructure](https://goteleport.com/docs/get-started/connect.md): Enroll the resources you want to protect with your Teleport cluster.

- [Step 1 - Deploy Teleport Community Edition](https://goteleport.com/docs/get-started/deploy-community.md): Deploy a self-hosted Teleport Community Edition cluster using the Linux demo.
- [Install Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation.md): Provides guidance on installing Teleport cluster components.
- [Deploying Teleport Agents](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents.md): Deploy Agents to enroll resources in your infrastructure with Teleport. You can run multiple Teleport services per Agent.
- [Enable a New Service on an Agent](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/add-service-to-agent.md): Explains how to edit the services that are running on a Teleport Agent.
- [Installing Teleport on Amazon ECS using Terraform](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/amazon-ecs.md): How to install and run Teleport Agents on Amazon ECS
- [Running Teleport Agents using Helm via ArgoCD](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/argocd-helm.md): How to install and configure Teleport Kubernetes agent using Helm and ArgoCD
- [Joining Services via AWS EC2 Identity Document](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/aws-ec2.md): Use the EC2 join method to add services to your Teleport cluster on AWS
- [Joining Services via AWS IAM Role](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/aws-iam.md): Use the IAM join method to add services to your Teleport cluster on AWS
- [Joining Services via Azure Managed Identity](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/azure.md): Use the Azure join method to join Teleport services to your Teleport cluster on Azure
- [Joining Services with Bound Keypair](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/bound-keypair.md): Use the Bound Keypair join method to add services to your Teleport cluster.
- [Joining Services using Bound Keypair Static Keys](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/bound-keypair-static-keys.md): Use the Bound Keypair join method to add services to your Teleport cluster.
- [Join Services with GCP](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/gcp.md): Use the GCP join method to add services to your Teleport cluster.
- [High Availability for Teleport Agents](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/high-availability.md): How to deploy Teleport Agents in a highly available (HA) configuration.
- [Join Services with a Secure Token](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/join-token.md): This guide shows you how to join a Teleport instance to your cluster using a join token in order to proxy access to resources in your infrastructure.
- [Joining Services via Kubernetes ServiceAccount Token](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/kubernetes.md): Use Kubernetes ServiceAccount tokens to join services running in the same Kubernetes cluster as the Auth Service.
- [Join Services with Oracle Cloud](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/agents/oracle.md): Use the Oracle join method to add services to your Teleport cluster.
- [Self-Hosting Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted.md): Guides to running a self-hosted Teleport cluster in production.
- [Deployment Guides](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/deployments.md): Teleport Installation and Configuration Reference Deployment Guides.
- [AWS Multi-Region Proxy Service Deployment](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/deployments/aws-gslb-proxy-peering-ha-deployment.md): Deploying a high-availability multi-region Teleport cluster using Proxy Peering and Route 53.
- [Deploy Teleport in Production with Terraform on AWS](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/deployments/aws-ha-autoscale-cluster-terraform.md): How to configure Teleport in High Availability mode for AWS deployments.
- [Teleport Single-Instance Deployment on AWS](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/deployments/aws-starter-cluster-terraform.md): How to quickly configure Teleport on a single instance for testing in AWS.
- [Running Teleport on GCP](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/deployments/gcp.md): How to install and configure Teleport on GCP
- [Deploying a High Availability Teleport Cluster](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/deployments/high-availability.md): Deploying a High Availability Teleport Cluster
- [Multi-region Blueprint](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/deployments/multi-region-blueprint.md): Blueprint describing how to deploy a multi-region Teleport Enterprise cluster using CockroachDB.
- [Separate Internal and External Proxy Service Traffic](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/deployments/separate-proxy-service-endpoints.md): Explains how to set up the Teleport Proxy Service to isolate traffic from the public internet from internal client traffic.
- [Guides for Running Teleport Using Helm](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/helm-deployments.md): How to install and configure Teleport in Kubernetes using Helm
- [Running an HA Teleport Cluster Using AWS, EKS, and Helm](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/helm-deployments/aws.md): Install and configure an HA Teleport cluster using an AWS EKS cluster
- [Running an HA Teleport cluster using Microsoft Azure, AKS, and Helm](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/helm-deployments/azure.md): Install and configure an HA Teleport cluster using a Microsoft Azure AKS cluster.
- [Running Teleport with a Custom Configuration using Helm](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/helm-deployments/custom.md): Install and configure a Teleport cluster with a custom configuration using Helm
- [Get started with Teleport on DigitalOcean Kubernetes](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/helm-deployments/digitalocean.md): How to get started with Teleport on DigitalOcean Kubernetes
- [Managing Disaster Recovery in an Amazon EKS Teleport Cluster](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/helm-deployments/disaster-recovery.md): Provides guidance for planning a strategy for restoring a self-hosted Teleport cluster on EKS after a regional outage.
- [Running an HA Teleport cluster using GCP, GKE, and Helm](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/helm-deployments/gcp.md): Install and configure an HA Teleport cluster using a Google Cloud GKE cluster.
- [Running Teleport on IBM Cloud](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/helm-deployments/ibm.md): How to install and configure Teleport on IBM cloud
- [Deploy Teleport on Kubernetes](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/helm-deployments/kubernetes-cluster.md): This guide shows you how to deploy Teleport on a Kubernetes cluster using Helm.
- [Kubernetes 1.25 Migration](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/helm-deployments/migration-kubernetes-1-25-psp.md): How to prepare for the PodSecurityPolicy removal happening in Kubernetes 1.25
- [Enterprise License File](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/license.md): How to manage your Teleport Enterprise license file.
- [Custom Private Key Management](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/private-keys.md): Provides information on managing Teleport private keys with a third-party service.
- [Store Teleport Private Keys in AWS KMS](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/private-keys/aws-kms.md): Configure Teleport to store CA private keys in the AWS Key Management Service
- [Store Teleport Private Keys in Google Cloud KMS](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/private-keys/gcp-kms.md): Configure Teleport to store CA private keys in the Google Cloud Key Management Service
- [Teleport HSM Support](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/private-keys/hsm.md): How to configure Hardware Security Modules to manage your Teleport CA private keys
- [Running Teleport with Self-Signed Certificates](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/self-hosted/self-signed-certs.md): This guide shows you how to run Teleport using self-signed certificates, which is helpful for testing or demo environments.
- [Installing Teleport on a Single Machine](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/single-machine.md): How to install Teleport and Teleport's client tools on your platform, including binaries and instructions for Docker.
- [Installing Teleport on Amazon EC2](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/single-machine/amazon-ec2.md): Deploy Teleport on Amazon EC2 using pre-built AMIs with Teleport pre-installed, either with Terraform or manual configuration.
- [Installing Teleport on Docker](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/single-machine/docker.md): How to install and run Teleport on Docker using our pre-built images from Amazon ECR Public, with details on configuration, data persistence, and networking.
- [Installing Teleport on Linux](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/single-machine/linux.md): How to install Teleport on Linux using our package repositories, TAR archives, or our one-line installation script for various distributions.
- [Installing Teleport on macOS](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/single-machine/macos.md): How to install Teleport client tools and services on macOS.
- [Building Teleport From Source](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/single-machine/source.md): How to build Teleport from source using Go and detailed instructions for building from source.
- [Installing Teleport on Windows](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/single-machine/windows.md): How to install Teleport's client tools (tsh, tctl, tbot) and Teleport Connect on Windows.
- [Uninstall Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/installation/uninstall-teleport.md): How to remove Teleport from your system
- [Public IP Address Allowlist](https://goteleport.com/docs/ips.md): Restrict outbound network connections from your infrastructure to cloud-hosted Teleport Enterprise.
- [Migrate Between Teleport Plans](https://goteleport.com/docs/migrate-plans.md): Explains how to migrate between Teleport Enterprise (Self-Hosted), Teleport Enterprise (Cloud), and Teleport Community Edition.
- [Teleport Upcoming Releases](https://goteleport.com/docs/upcoming-releases.md): A timeline of upcoming Teleport releases.
- [Upgrading Teleport](https://goteleport.com/docs/upgrading.md): Explains how to upgrade Teleport depending on your environment and edition.
- [Managed Updates for Teleport Agents and Bots](https://goteleport.com/docs/upgrading/agent-managed-updates.md): Describes how to set up Managed Updates for Teleport Agents and Bots
- [Managed Updates v2 in EC2 Agents](https://goteleport.com/docs/upgrading/agent-managed-updates/bootstrap-ec2-agent.md): Describes how to set up EC2 instance by cloud-init script and install Teleport with "teleport-update enable"
- [Managed Updates for Teleport Agents (legacy)](https://goteleport.com/docs/upgrading/agent-managed-updates-v1.md): Describes how to set up Managed Updates for Teleport Agents (v1)
- [Teleport Client Tool Managed Updates](https://goteleport.com/docs/upgrading/client-tools-managed-updates.md): Explains how to use Teleport client tools (`tsh` and `tctl`) managed updates.
- [Cloud Cluster Updates](https://goteleport.com/docs/upgrading/cloud-cluster-updates.md): Provides a high-level overview of Teleport cluster updates on Cloud.
- [Upgrading Compatibility Overview](https://goteleport.com/docs/upgrading/overview.md): Provides a high-level description of how to upgrade the components in your Teleport cluster. Read this guide before following upgrade instructions for your environment.
- [Manual Upgrades](https://goteleport.com/docs/upgrading/upgrading-manual.md): Provides detailed information on upgrading Teleport without Managed Updates.
- [Usage Reporting](https://goteleport.com/docs/usage-billing.md): Provides a detailed breakdown of Teleport usage reporting.
